---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's the current limitation?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — screenshots, links, examples.

> **⚠️ Privacy reminder:** Do not include credentials, private repository
> names, personal hostnames/IPs, real App IDs, or any secrets in this request.
